title: potentilla speciosa subsp. illyrica
intro: Potentilla speciosa subsp. illyrica is a subspecies of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae), commonly known as the Illyrian potentilla or Illyrian cinquefoil. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues. Potentilla speciosa subsp. illyrica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to make teas, salves, or ointments for topical application.
